top_findings.title: POST /books dead over HTTP — handler init/2 calls nonexistent cowboy_req:match_params/1
top_findings.evidence: src/book_api_handler.erl:9 cowboy_req:match_params(Req0); 0 occurrences in cowboy 2.10.0 cowboy_req.erl. init/2 raises undef on every /books request.
top_findings.suggestion: Use cowboy_req:binding(id, Req0, undefined) and branch on undefined.

top_findings.title: GET /books dead over HTTP — same match_params/1 undef crash
top_findings.evidence: src/book_api_handler.erl:9 crashes before the GET collection clause at line 38.

top_findings.title: ?author= filter broken three ways: nonexistent cowboy_req:query_param/2, unreachable, and type-mismatched
top_findings.evidence: src/book_api_handler.erl:39 query_param/2 absent from cowboy 2.10.0; unreachable via :9; binary_to_list at :41 vs binary DB author at :61.
top_findings.suggestion: Use cowboy_req:match_qs and compare against a binary.

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} dead over HTTP — same match_params/1 undef crash
top_findings.evidence: src/book_api_handler.erl:9 crashes before handle_book_request GET clause at line 76.

top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} dead over HTTP — match_params/1 undef plus jiffy decode defect
top_findings.evidence: src/book_api_handler.erl:9 crashes; line 93 jiffy:decode without return_maps -> is_map guard at :98 never matches.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix init/2 (R1) and use jiffy:decode with [return_maps].
